nasb.text: “Thus says Sennacherib king of Assyria, ‘On what are you trusting that you are remaining in Jerusalem under siege?

esv.text: “Thus says Sennacherib king of Assyria, ‘On what are you trusting, that you endure the siege in Jerusalem?

cnv.text: “亞述王西拿基立這樣說：‘你們現在還在耶路撒冷受困，你們可倚靠甚麼呢？

ccb.text: “亚述王西拿基立这样说，‘你们仍然留在被困的耶路撒冷，究竟倚仗什么呢？
